evals.name: trigger-post-fork
evals.prompt: I just forked this starter kit for a new project — how do I adapt the Claude configuration?

assertions.text: Provides the post-fork adaptation checklist: rename project/repo references and commit trailer, update hardcoded versions, remove non-applicable skills/rules, run audit.py

evals.name: trigger-stack-change
evals.prompt: Our fork dropped MongoDB and Vuetify — which Claude config should I strip?

assertions.text: Identifies removable skills/rules (vuetify-components, ObjectId validation rule, design-scss if styling differs) and the version-sensitive locations to update

evals.name: negative-feature-work
evals.prompt: Add a new dashboard component to the app

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger starter-kit-adapt; day-to-day feature work belongs to the vue/design agents
